productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Solid Grey Track Pants
description: Style Note Working out, travelling or just chilling is always easier and more comfortable in a pair of soft and well fitted track pants. Leave your jeans and tight trousers behind and embrace these breathable and snug track pants from urban yoga. Pair them with a soft and comfortable T-shirt and sports shoes when you're working out, or a pair of flip flops when you're chilling at home. An enviable, casually stylish look is now easy to pull off! Product Details Grey track pants with a soft elastic and adjustable drawstring band at the waist, two pockets in the front, blue panelling at the sides Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% lycra Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low and dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 40
